title: dortmanna subpubera
intro: Dortmanna subpubera, also known as the Dortmann's sub-pubescent plant or Dortmanna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna subpubera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna subpubera can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
